basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani PhD Research Scholar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani (BITS Pilani)
basic_details.short_information: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani (BITS Pilani) PhD Research Scholar Notification 2026 has been released on the official website bits-pilani.ac.in. A total of 1 PhD Research Scholar vacancy has been announced through the BITS Pilani PhD Research Scholar Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: A Bachelor's degree in Engineering AND/OR a postgraduate degree (M.E./M.Tech./M.S.), with First Class, in Mechanical Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, or Biomechanics.
qualification.details: A Bachelor's degree in Engineering AND/OR a postgraduate degree (M.E./M.Tech./M.S.), with First Class, in Mechanical Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, or Biomechanics.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BITS Pilani to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BITS Pilani PhD Research Scholar Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the BITS Pilani Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download BITS Pilani PhD Research Scholar Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: BITS Pilani PhD Research Scholar Vacancy Details 2026
BITS Pilani PhD Research Scholar Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: A Bachelor's degree in Engineering AND/OR a postgraduate degree (M.E./M.Tech./M.S.), with First Class, in Mechanical Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, or Biomechanics.

content_sections.heading: BITS Pilani PhD Research Scholar Salary 2026
BITS Pilani PhD Research Scholar Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
BITS Pilani PhD Research Scholar Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BITS Pilani to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BITS Pilani PhD Research Scholar Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BITS Pilani PhD Research Scholar position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the PhD Research Scholar position at BITS Pilani is 21st July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the PhD Research Scholar role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree in Engineering and/or a postgraduate degree (M.E./M.Tech./M.S.) with First Class in Mechanical Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, or Biomechanics.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for the BITS Pilani PhD Research Scholar recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the PhD Research Scholar position?
faq.answer: The selected PhD Research Scholar will receive a monthly stipend ranging from Rs. 55,000 to Rs. 60,000.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the PhD Research Scholar position?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves an Application Review. Further stages, if any, will be communicated by the institute.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official BITS Pilani website. Ensure all details are correctly filled and submitted before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. Does BITS Pilani offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Information regarding age limits and any potential age relaxation for reserved categories is not explicitly detailed here and should be confirmed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Which specific engineering disciplines are preferred for this PhD Research Scholar position?
faq.answer: The preferred disciplines for this role are Mechanical Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, or Biomechanics.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for BITS Pilani PhD Research Scholar recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article, under the "Official Notification PDF" link.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply offline for the PhD Research Scholar position?
faq.answer: No, applications for the BITS Pilani PhD Research Scholar recruitment must be submitted online only. Offline applications will not be considered.
